category_sources: Official ZeroMQ Get Started page describes libzmq as the low-level library behind language bindings.
source_facts.description says ZeroMQ is a high-performance asynchronous messaging library.
display_name_sources: Official site uses the ZeroMQ name.
source_facts.homepage is zeromq.org and source_facts.description uses ZeroMQ.
docs_sources: Official ZeroMQ site provides Get Started documentation.
The official ZeroMQ Guide is hosted at zguide.zeromq.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official Get Started page describes ZeroMQ message queue behavior and libzmq.
